raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Leon Raymond Hubbard Jr. Marine Fish Hatchery in Carlsbad is the only marine fish hatchery in California conducting research on marine species, their habitats, and their survivability.",
    "Climate change severely strains the world’s oceans.",
    "AB 1949 aims to ensure the legacy of sustainability-based hatchery management can continue in coastal North County.",
    "The program established by AB 1949 evaluates the economic and ecological feasibility of releasing hatchery-reared fish to restore depleted native marine fish populations.",
    "A comprehensive review conducted by the Scripps Institution of Oceanography found that the marine hatchery program could benefit from several improvements."
  ]
}
```
